meta.decision_rationale: Activation of Specula Method for a community library seeking to formalize governance around collection curation and community voice in decision-making.
tradeoffs: More formal governance may slow some decisions initially
Community involvement requires time investment from volunteers
rejected_alternatives: Maintaining informal consensus model (risk of vocal minorities overriding silent majority)
Delegation to single librarian (risk of personal bias in collection decisions)

payload.next_required_input: Proceed to Phase 1: define future scenarios for the library's role in the community
